{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/64763093?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/R-s0n/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/R-s0n/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/R-s0n/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/R-s0n/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/R-s0n", "id": 64763093, "login": "R-s0n", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjY0NzYzMDkz", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/R-s0n/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/R-s0n/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/R-s0n/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/R-s0n/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/R-s0n/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/R-s0n", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2024-37155", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-284", "name": "Improper Access Control"}], "description": "### Summary

The regex validation used to prevent Introspection queries can be bypassed by removing the extra whitespace, carriage return, and line feed characters from the query.

### Details

GraphQL Queries in OpenCTI can be validated using the `secureIntrospectionPlugin`.

### Impact
Bypassing this restriction allows the attacker to gather a wealth of information about the GraphQL endpoint functionality that can be used to perform actions and/or read data without authorization.  These queries can also be weaponized to conduct a Denial of Service (DoS) attack if sent repeatedly.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00442, "percentile": 0.35542}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-4mvw-j8r9-xcgc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-22T16:43:24Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4mvw-j8r9-xcgc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-4mvw-j8r9-xcgc"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2024-37155"}], "nvd_published_at": "2024-11-18T15:15:06Z", "published_at": "2026-06-22T16:43:24Z", "references": ["https://github.com/OpenCTI-Platform/opencti/security/advisories/GHSA-4mvw-j8r9-xcgc", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-37155", "https://github.com/OpenCTI-Platform/opencti/commit/f87d96918c63b0c3d3ebfbea6c789d48e2f56ad5", "https://github.com/OpenCTI-Platform/opencti/blob/6343b82b0b0a5d3ded3b30d08ce282328a556268/opencti-platform/opencti-graphql/src/graphql/graphql.js#L83-L94", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/pycti/PYSEC-2024-313.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-4mvw-j8r9-xcgc"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/OpenCTI-Platform/opencti/security-advisories/GHSA-4mvw-j8r9-xcgc", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/OpenCTI-Platform/opencti", "summary": "OpenCTI May Bypass Introspection Restriction", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-22T16:44:09Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-4mvw-j8r9-xcgc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.1.9", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "pycti"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.1.9"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenCTI May Bypass Introspection Restriction
